strings.Are you sure you want to un-fix? This wi: Ye sure ye wanna undo the patchwork? This'll rip out the fix planks n' inspect the hull!
Searchin' the seas fer an online patch...
strings.DLCs are added together with the base ga:
Extra treasure be bundled with the main vessel. To patch this booty, sail to the main vessel's page:

{gameName}
strings.Error applying fix: Blimey! Couldn't nail the patch to the hull!
strings.Error starting Online Fix: Blimey! Couldn't start the online patchwork!
strings.Error, Timed Out: Timed out! The wind died on us!
Couldn't scout the waters fer patches.
strings.Game install path not found: Can't find where the treasure be buried!
Arrr, no treasure found in any cove!
strings.Invalid Morrenus API Key format: That Morrenus key don't look right, ye scallywag
strings.Invalid key format: That key be malformed, ye bilge rat
strings.Invalid or rejected key: Yer key be counterfeit or walked the plank
strings.Left click to install, Right click for S: Left click to plunder, Right click fer the charts
strings.Only possible thanks to {name} 💜: Wouldn't be possible without {name}, a true pirate legend 💜
strings.Removed {count} files. Running Steam ver: Tossed {count} items overboard. Inspectin' the hull...
Scouring the seven seas for loot...
strings.Select Download Source: Choose yer vessel fer the haul
The booty's been stashed in yer hold, cap'n!
strings.This game may not work, support for it w: This bounty might be cursed, no harbor in our tavern fer it
Checkin' how much loot ye can still plunder...
strings.You have exceeded your daily download li: Ye've plundered too much booty today! Wait 'til the next sunrise fer more, or upgrade yer ship at the Morrenus port.
strings.Your Morrenus API key is invalid or expi: Yer Morrenus key be invalid or expired, ye scurvy dog! Check yer key in the captain's quarters or forge a new one at the Morrenus port.
strings.bigpicture.mouseTip: To use yer mouse in Steam: Guide Button + Right Joystick, fire with RB
strings.days left: days til ye walk the plank
strings.disclaimer.inputLabel: type "I Understand" in the box below to set sail
strings.disclaimer.line1: GreenVapor be not affiliated with Millennium in any way, savvy?
strings.disclaimer.line2: Millennium will NOT offer ye support fer this plugin on their discord ship
strings.disclaimer.line3: Ye will be MAROONED from both GreenVapor and Millennium waters if ye go askin' fer help on their discord
strings.disclaimer.title: Heed This Warning!
strings.menu.error.getPath: Can't chart the course to the treasure!
strings.menu.error.noInstall: Can't find where this treasure be buried!
strings.menu.error.notInstalled: This treasure ain't aboard yet! Plunder n' stash it first :D
strings.menu.title: GreenVapor · Captain's Log
strings.settings.donateKeys.description: Share yer decryption keys with the fleet, helps all pirates!
strings.settings.donateKeys.label: Share Yer Keys
strings.settings.fastDownload.description: Grab the first booty ye find without askin'!
strings.settings.fastDownload.label: Swift Sailings
strings.settings.installedFixes.deleteConfirm: Ye sure ye wanna rip this patch off? This'll remove the fix n' inspect the hull!
strings.settings.installedFixes.empty: No patches nailed to the hull yet.
strings.settings.installedFixes.title: Installed Patchwork
strings.settings.installedLua.loading: Searchin' the hold fer treasure scripts...
strings.settings.installedLua.title: Plundered Games
strings.settings.installedLua.unknownInfo: Treasure marked 'Mystery' was stashed from foreign ports (not via GreenVapor).
strings.settings.language.label: Tongue
strings.settings.theme.description: Choose the colors fer yer ship's flag.
strings.settings.theme.label: Ship's Colors
strings.settings.title: GreenVapor · Captain's Quarters
strings.settings.useSteamLanguage.description: Use Steam's tongue instead of GreenVapor setting.
strings.settings.useSteamLanguage.label: Use Steam's Tongue
strings.settings.morrenusApiKey.label: Morrenus Secret Scroll
strings.settings.morrenusApiKey.description: Ye be needin' this mark to scupper Sadie's Loot. Plunder it from {link}
